headline: Data at Heart Rhythm 2026 highlight key Boston Scientific therapies
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced data supporting use of the company's FARAPULSE™ Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) Platform and WATCHMAN™ Left Atrial Appendage Closure (LAAC) technologies. All data were presented at Heart Rhythm 2026, the annual meeting of the Heart Rhythm Society, held in Chicago from April 24-26.
